All five selected memories address exactly this pattern: they document similar TilingFunc errors in other ca6k operators where setter methods are missing, and advise using direct member assignment instead of setter calls. This principle directly applies to the current repair—the fix is to assign to the underscored members (e.g., `tiling.totalLength_`). These memories are from the same category (torch#1) and tool_mode (no_tool), providing targeted guidance for resolving the compilation error.
